name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire OPQ32r
description: The OPQ32r measures 32 workplace behaviour dimensions covering how people prefer to relate to others, approach tasks, and manage feelings. Used for selection, development, leadership assessment, team building, and talent management across all seniority levels including executives, managers, and individual contributors. Predicts workplace performance, leadership potential, and cultural fit.

name: OPQ Universal Competency Report 2.0
description: A report generated from OPQ32r data that maps personality results to 20 universal competencies. Used for selection and development decisions. Provides a comprehensive competency-based view of candidate personality. Ideal for comparing candidates against leadership and role-specific benchmarks.

name: OPQ Leadership Report
description: A report from OPQ32r data focused specifically on leadership qualities and executive behaviour. Ideal for senior leadership selection and development, CXO hiring, director-level assessment, and comparing candidates against leadership benchmarks. Covers strategic thinking, influencing, and leadership style dimensions.

name: OPQ MQ Sales Report
description: A report generated from OPQ32r (and optionally MQ) data that presents personality results in a sales-specific context. Highlights behaviours most relevant to sales success including persuasion, resilience, drive, and customer focus. Can optionally incorporate Motivation Questionnaire (MQ) data to show sales motivators. Used for sales rep selection, sales organisation development, and re-skilling initiatives.

name: Sales Transformation 2.0 - Individual Contributor
description: Assesses how sales individual contributors show up in digital-first selling environments. Measures behaviours critical for modern sales including virtual selling, digital engagement, and customer-centric approaches. Used in sales transformation initiatives and organisational restructuring.

name: Sales Transformation 2.0 - Sales Manager
description: Assesses how first-line sales managers lead and coach in digital-first selling models. Used alongside Sales Transformation 2.0 - Individual Contributor to differentiate leader vs rep reporting in a sales transformation programme.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Measures what motivates and energises people at work across 18 motivating factors. Used to understand engagement drivers, cultural fit, and retention risk. Often combined with OPQ32r in sales or leadership contexts to add motivational data to personality insights.

name: Global Skills Assessment
description: A self-reported skills and competency assessment used for talent audits, workforce planning, and re-skilling initiatives. Captures an individual's current skill levels across a comprehensive framework. Ideal for annual talent audits, organisational restructuring, and identifying skill gaps across teams or entire organisations.

name: Global Skills Development Report
description: Development report generated from Global Skills Assessment data. Provides personalised development recommendations and action plans based on identified skill gaps. Used alongside GSA in re-skilling and talent development programmes.

name: SHL Verify Interactive G+
description: An adaptive cognitive ability test measuring inductive, numerical, and deductive reasoning in a single assessment. The interactive format with drag-and-drop and scenario-based items makes it engaging and harder to fake. Suitable for graduate, professional, and senior roles. Predicts learning agility and ability to handle complex problems. Used for technical roles, graduate programmes, and management positions.

name: SHL Verify Interactive – Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to work with numerical data, interpret tables, graphs, and financial information. Interactive format with realistic business data scenarios. Used for finance, analyst, and data-focused roles. Suitable for graduate financial analysts, business analysts, and data scientists.

name: SHL Verify Interactive – Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to understand and evaluate written information, draw logical conclusions, and communicate in written form. Used for roles requiring strong communication, report writing, and analytical reading. Suitable for graduate, management, and professional roles.

name: SHL Verify Interactive – Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to identify patterns, think abstractly, and solve novel problems. Particularly relevant for technology, engineering, and analytical roles. Used for developer, data scientist, and technical analyst positions.

name: SHL Verify Interactive – Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to draw logical conclusions from given premises and apply rules consistently. Used in selection for roles requiring rigorous logical thinking such as legal, technology, and analytical positions.

name: Graduate Scenarios
description: A situational judgement test designed specifically for graduate-level candidates with no or limited work experience. Presents realistic workplace scenarios and asks candidates how they would respond. Measures work-readiness, professional judgment, and decision-making. Ideal for graduate management trainee programmes, graduate recruitment schemes, and entry-level professional hiring.

name: Smart Interview Live Coding
description: An adaptive live-coding interview platform where panels can create custom coding tasks in any programming language. Supports Rust, Go, Python, Java, C++, JavaScript, and more. Allows real-time observation of coding approach, problem decomposition, and code quality. Ideal for senior software engineers, systems programmers, and specialised language experts where no specific knowledge test exists.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level) (New)
description: Tests advanced Java programming knowledge including concurrency, JVM internals, performance tuning, design patterns, and production microservice development. Calibrated for senior Java developers who own end-to-end service delivery. Covers Java 8+ features, multithreading, memory management, and architectural patterns.

name: Core Java (Entry Level) (New)
description: Tests foundational Java programming knowledge for junior developers and graduates. Covers basic syntax, OOP concepts, collections, and reading existing code. Calibrated for graduate Java developer roles and junior software engineers.

name: Spring (New)
description: Tests knowledge of the Spring Framework including Spring Boot, Spring MVC, dependency injection, REST APIs with Spring, Spring Security, and Spring Data. Used for backend Java developer roles that use Spring as their primary framework.

name: RESTful Web Services (New)
description: Tests knowledge of REST API design principles, HTTP methods, status codes, authentication patterns, API versioning, and best practices. Used for backend developers, API designers, and full-stack engineers.

name: SQL (New)
description: Tests SQL and relational database knowledge including queries, joins, aggregations, transactions, indexing, and database design. Used for developer, analyst, and data roles that require database skills.

name: Amazon Web Services (AWS) Development (New)
description: Tests AWS cloud development knowledge including EC2, S3, Lambda, ECS, IAM, VPC, and cloud-native development patterns. Used for cloud engineers, DevOps engineers, and backend developers working on AWS infrastructure.

name: Docker (New)
description: Tests Docker containerisation knowledge including images, containers, Dockerfiles, Docker Compose, container networking, and Docker in CI/CD pipelines. Used for DevOps engineers, backend developers, and platform engineers.

name: Linux Programming (General)
description: Tests Linux system programming knowledge including system calls, process management, file systems, shell scripting, networking, and Linux kernel concepts. Used for systems programmers, infrastructure engineers, and backend developers working in Linux environments.

name: Networking and Implementation (New)
description: Tests computer networking knowledge including TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP/HTTPS, load balancing, network security, and networking implementation patterns. Used for network engineers, backend infrastructure developers, and systems engineers.

name: Python (New)
description: Tests Python programming knowledge including data structures, OOP, file handling, libraries, and Pythonic patterns. Used for software developers, data scientists, automation engineers, and backend developers using Python.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Tests JavaScript programming knowledge including ES6+, async patterns, DOM manipulation, closures, and modern JavaScript concepts. Used for frontend and full-stack developers.

name: Angular (New)
description: Tests Angular framework knowledge including components, modules, services, routing, RxJS, and TypeScript integration. Used for frontend and full-stack developers working with Angular.

name: Agile Development (New)
description: Tests knowledge of Agile methodologies, Scrum, Kanban, sprint planning, and agile best practices. Used for developers, scrum masters, product owners, and engineering leads.

name: Cybersecurity (New)
description: Tests cybersecurity knowledge including network security, threat identification, encryption, access control, and security best practices. Used for security engineers, IT administrators, and roles with security responsibilities.

name: Microsoft Excel 365 (New)
description: A simulation-based assessment of Microsoft Excel 365 skills. Candidates perform real tasks within a simulated Excel environment including formulas, pivot tables, charts, and data analysis. Tests practical Excel proficiency beyond conceptual knowledge.

name: Microsoft Word 365 (New)
description: A simulation-based assessment of Microsoft Word 365 skills. Candidates perform real document creation and formatting tasks in a simulated Word environment. Tests practical Word proficiency.

name: Microsoft Word 365 - Essentials (New)
description: A simulation-based assessment of essential Microsoft Word 365 skills. Covers core document formatting, editing, and creation tasks. Used for healthcare admin, general administrative, and office support roles.

name: MS Excel (New)
description: A quick knowledge test for Microsoft Excel covering formulas, functions, formatting, and data management. Shorter than the simulation variant but covers conceptual Excel knowledge. Used for quick volume screening of administrative roles.

name: MS Word (New)
description: A quick knowledge test for Microsoft Word covering document creation, formatting, and editing concepts. Shorter than the simulation variant. Used for fast volume screening of administrative and office support roles.

name: Financial Accounting (New)
description: Tests knowledge of financial accounting principles, concepts, and practices including balance sheets, income statements, journal entries, and GAAP basics. Used for finance graduate recruitment, financial analyst hiring, and accounting roles.

name: Basic Statistics (New)
description: Tests knowledge of statistical concepts including mean, median, mode, probability, distributions, and basic data interpretation. Used for data analyst, financial analyst, and quantitative roles where statistical understanding is required.

name: SVAR Spoken English (US) (New)
description: An automated spoken English assessment calibrated for US English accent. Measures clarity, pronunciation, fluency, and comprehension in spoken American English. Used for customer-facing roles including contact centre agents, customer service reps, and phone-based roles serving US customers.

name: SVAR Spoken English (UK) (New)
description: An automated spoken English assessment calibrated for UK English accent. Used for contact centre and customer service roles serving UK customers.

name: SVAR Spoken English (Australian) (New)
description: An automated spoken English assessment calibrated for Australian English accent. Used for contact centre and customer service roles serving Australian customers.

name: SVAR Spoken English (Indian) (New)
description: An automated spoken English assessment calibrated for Indian English accent. Used for contact centre and BPO roles in India serving international customers.

name: Contact Center Call Simulation (New)
description: A standalone simulation of real contact centre calls. Candidates handle simulated inbound customer calls and are assessed on their responses. Newer product focused purely on the in-call interaction experience. Ideal for high-volume contact centre screening at the initial stage.

name: Customer Service Phone Simulation
description: A bundled solution combining situational judgement and phone simulation for customer service roles. Older, established product that provides depth beyond the standalone simulation. Often used at finalist stage after initial volume screening. Covers customer service behaviours, phone etiquette, and situational judgement in a customer context.

name: Entry Level Customer Serv - Retail & Contact Center
description: A personality and competency assessment calibrated for entry-level customer service roles in retail and contact centres. Measures behavioural fit for customer-facing work including patience, service orientation, and reliability. Available in multiple languages for international deployment.

name: Dependability and Safety Instrument (DSI)
description: A standalone personality instrument measuring integrity, reliability, safety attitudes, and rule compliance. Predicts safety behaviour, dependability, and conscientiousness. Used across sectors for roles where trust, compliance, and reliability are critical including healthcare admin, security, and any role with access to sensitive data or materials.

name: Manufac. & Indust. - Safety & Dependability 8.0
description: A bundled safety and dependability assessment solution with norms calibrated specifically for manufacturing and industrial workforces. Sector-specific version of the DSI for plant operators, chemical facility workers, and industrial employees where safety is the top priority. Measures safety attitudes, procedure compliance, and dependability with industry-specific benchmarks.

name: Workplace Health and Safety (New)
description: Tests knowledge of workplace health and safety regulations, procedures, hazard identification, and safety compliance. Used for frontline and industrial roles where safety knowledge is required alongside behavioural safety measures.

name: HIPAA (Security)
description: Tests knowledge of HIPAA security provisions, patient data protection, privacy rules, and healthcare information security requirements. Used for healthcare administrative staff, medical records personnel, and anyone who handles protected health information (PHI).

name: Medical Terminology (New)
description: Tests knowledge of medical terminology, anatomical terms, and clinical vocabulary. Used for healthcare administrative staff, medical receptionists, and support staff who need to understand medical language.

name: Project Management (New)
description: Tests knowledge of project management methodologies, planning, risk management, and stakeholder management. Used for project managers, programme managers, and roles with project delivery responsibilities.

name: Supply Chain Management (New)
description: Tests knowledge of supply chain principles, logistics, procurement, and operations management. Used for supply chain analysts, operations managers, and logistics roles.

name: Administrative Professional - Short Form
description: A personality and competency assessment calibrated for administrative professional roles. Measures organisational skills, attention to detail, reliability, and interpersonal effectiveness relevant to admin support functions.

name: Data Entry Speed and Accuracy
description: Measures data entry speed and accuracy through realistic keying tasks. Used for clerical, admin, and data processing roles where data entry is a core function.

name: OPQ32 Development Report
description: A development-focused report generated from OPQ32r data. Provides personalised development advice for individuals based on their personality profile. Used in developmental assessment centres, coaching, and talent development programmes.

name: OPQ Team Report
description: Aggregates OPQ32r personality data across a team to provide team-level insights. Highlights team strengths, risks, and dynamics. Used for team building, succession planning, and team development interventions.

name: Mechanical Comprehension Test
description: Tests understanding of mechanical principles, tools, and physical concepts. Used for engineering, technical, and trades roles where mechanical aptitude is required.

name: Retail Sales Associate - Short Form
description: Personality and competency assessment calibrated for retail sales associate roles. Measures customer orientation, energy, reliability, and service focus relevant to retail environments.

name: Managed Health Professional
description: Personality assessment calibrated for managed care and healthcare professional roles. Assesses interpersonal skills, resilience, and behavioural fit for clinical and administrative healthcare positions.
